ATL.note: Core likely intact, limited flexibility for major upgrades.

BOS.note: Tatum returns healthy. Capped out, roster frozen, limited trade flexibility.

BKN.note: Roster in flux, potential for significant changes or cap space.

CHA.note: Young core developing, significant cap space for future moves.

CHI.note: Limited flexibility, likely stand-pat at deadline. Key young players on cheap deals.

CLE.note: Young core on extensions, limited cap flexibility.

DET.note: Deep young core, significant cap space, high upside.

IND.note: Haliburton returns healthy. Competitive team, buyer at deadline.

MIA.note: Veteran core, limited cap flexibility, potential for minor moves.

MIL.note: Capped out, roster frozen, limited trade flexibility.

NYK.note: Competitive roster, potential for trade-deadline upgrades.

ORL.note: Young, developing core with cap flexibility for future.

PHI.note: High salaries, Paul George's contract is a bad chip, limited trade flexibility.

TOR.note: Re-tooling, potential for trades to reshape roster.

WAS.note: Dybantsa joins Davis/Young; building around young star.

DAL.note: Doncic era, contending team, capped out, limited flexibility.

DEN.note: Contending team, capped out, limited flexibility.

GSW.note: Roster transitioning, potential for trades with veteran contracts.

HOU.note: Young core with high salaries, likely buyer, limited cap flexibility.

LAC.note: Capped out, roster frozen, limited trade flexibility. Key players guaranteed.

LAL.note: Doncic era, contending team, capped out, limited flexibility.

MEM.note: Young core, potential for in-season improvement, buyer at deadline.

MIN.note: Capped out, roster frozen, limited trade flexibility.

NOP.note: Competitive, but injury concerns; buyer at deadline.

OKC.note: Projected over second apron, need to slash payroll, limited flexibility.

PHX.note: Capped out, roster frozen, limited trade flexibility.

POR.note: Over cap but under tax, young core, Lillard's health key, seeking trades.

SAC.note: Over second apron, limited flexibility, need depth at guard and wing.

SAS.note: Deep young core, Wembanyama extension, Quaintance injury, high upside.

UTA.note: Young core, Nurkic signed, Kessler RFA drama, good financial flexibility.
